unresolved_risks.title: Live frontend parity remains blocked by CORS

unresolved_risks.next_action: Align live API CORS allowlist with live frontend origin in production environment.

unresolved_risks.title: Live credential-gated auth/stash/restart flows cannot be executed
evidence: Current env has no live session/bootstrap creds; dotenv bearer token returns 401 auth_invalid on /api/v1/ops/services
unresolved_risks.next_action: Provide valid live poeSessionId bootstrap credential and live operator token, then rerun task-10 flows with allowlist safety policy.

Gold marts currently empty in active ClickHouse

README and docs now distinguish QA/local behavior from live auth expectations
